_comment: Translator notes for th.json. Use polite formal register (suitable for an enterprise dashboard). Where a confirmed Thai term wasn't available, the JSON keeps the English term verbatim — these are listed below with a TODO so a native reviewer can finalise.

todo.nav.workflow: Currently keeps the English term 'Workflow'. Confirm preferred Thai: e.g. 'กระบวนการทำงาน'.
todo.anomaly.title: การตรวจจับความผิดปกติ is a literal translation; verify with domain SME for ESG reporting parlance.
todo.publicReport.verifyBlockchain: Blockchain kept untransliterated; confirm whether บล็อกเชน is preferred.
todo.common.actions: Confirm context-appropriate term — currently 'การดำเนินการ'.
